examples: For each button, you can specify the type of button (link or pushbutton) and the actual caption to use.
You can customize the buttons, for example changing their type to PushButton instead of LinkButton.
Magic pushbutton: Coding implementation logic directly within interface code, without using abstraction.
Analog joystick with central push-button two axis (X and Y) and a center pushbutton.
Optional new features include keyless entry and pushbutton start and HondaLink, which connects to the driver's smartphone and plays music or reads updates from Twitter and Facebook.
